title: EasyElytras
description: Allows Craftable Elytras without Needed End or Nether Travel
body:
Allows Craftable Elytra's through only the use of phantom membranes. without No End or Nether Travel is needed to obtain elytra's. Great for SMP servers that have Elytra scarcity due to all the looting near spawn.

Demo Video Here ---> https://youtu.be/5D4rOMPVXec
